model.quality_prompt: masterpiece, best quality, newest, highres, polished anime illustration, clean linework

workflow.notes: Native-node WebUI-like chain: txt2img, LoRA insertion, latent Hires.fix, second denoise pass, VAE decode, final pixel resize, save.

positive_prompt: final night peephole view, a second version of the player standing outside the apartment door in rain shadow, ambiguous silhouette, psychological horror ending CG, no readable text, polished anime horror CG, fisheye peephole distortion, dramatic rim light, CRT noise, palette of cold cyan, emergency red, green-black, pale skin tones, identity doubt, final judgment, uncanny calm, polished illustration, strong composition, cohesive lighting, refined details, masterpiece, best quality, newest, highres, polished anime illustration, clean linework
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, watermark, signature, unwanted text, logo, messy linework, distorted anatomy, worst quality, normal quality, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra fingers, malformed hands

workflow_safety.lora_policy: no final game LoRA; prompt-only SDXL txt2img source asset
workflow_safety.hires_fix: first-pass denoise may be 1.0; audited hires parameters are hires_scale, hires_steps, and hires_denoise
